specialRule.name: Reap the Tally
specialRule.desc: Each time a WORLD EATERS unit from your army (excluding Kharn the Betrayer) is destroyed by a melee attack and it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 5+ do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making it's attacks, and is then removed from play. Chaos Terminator squads can perform the Secure Site Tactical Manoeuve as if they had the BATTLELINE keyword.

enhancements.name: Frenzied
enhancements.desc: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer, and the bearer is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

enhancements.name: Carmine Corona
enhancements.desc: When the bearer destroys a unit for the first time, until the end of the battle, the bearer has an Objective Control characteristic of 5.

keywordRatio.description: Jakhals units cannot outnumber Khorne Berserkers units

specialRule.name: Focused Ferocity
specialRule.desc: Each time a WORLD EATERS unit from your army declares a charge, each target of that charge must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Chosen of Khorne
enhancements.desc: Once the bearer has destroyed one or more enemy units, until the end of the battle, each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll all of the dice (if you do, you must re-roll every dice).

enhancements.name: Battle Lust
enhancements.desc: Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if the bearer was the target of one or more of those attacks, it can make a Battle Lust move. To do so, roll one D6: the bearer can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but must end that move as close as possible to the attacking unit. When doing so, the bearer can be moved within Engagement range of that enemy unit, but only that enemy unit.

units.name: Kharn the Betrayer
units.rulesAdaptations: This unit loses the The Betrayer ability.

units.name: Eightbound
units.rulesAdaptations: This unit loses the Scouts ability. Its Movement characteristic is reduced to 9".

units.name: Exalted Eightbound
units.rulesAdaptations: This unit's Movement characteristic is reduced to 9".

units.name: Khorne Berserkers
units.rulesAdaptations: This unit loses the Blood Surge ability.

units.name: Jakhals
units.rulesAdaptations: This unit loses the Objective Ravaged ability. This unit does not split into separate units in the Form Boarding Squads step.

units.name: Chaos Spawn
units.rulesAdaptations: This unit loses the Scouts ability.
